title: CeLinkHeartbeatRequest
description: Body of POST /api/ce-link/{installId}/heartbeat. Sent by a CE install every few minutes (doc/CLOUD_LINK_ONBOARDING.md §3.5). The installId is taken from the URL path so it can't be tampered with in the body. Mirrors `com.apimarketplace.auth.dto.CeLinkHeartbeatRequest` (Java).

ceVersion.description: Current CE distribution version. Surfaces in `lastSeenCeVersion` on GET /mine and on the §1 #27 audit cadence rows.
